claims.falsification: schemas/lean-replay-verification-pass-0034.json is missing, has a different schema, status, source binding, verifier exit code, axiom check count, or seal
claims.text: Pass 0034 created a LeanReplayVerificationPacket/v1 artifact with status LEAN_REPLAY_VERIFIED_WITH_AXIOM_BOUNDARY, source_provisioning_sha256 e4a4085f9711d672ee18a08e85aa55b6fabe8f64807daad53eff382506b9a366, verifier_exit_code 0, axiom_check_count 10, and seal bbe72907f7bc745c4bdc19f2162050d0dc7e48ea9382bc0b09f226f2500539bd.

claims.falsification: the replay fixture is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or is not linked from the schema
claims.text: Pass 0034 records fixture fixtures/lean-replay-verification-pass-0034.json with sha256 eef39b1caa78dd2d996589b08c40b93881cfe45d17e2b15479ec9aa8d5b9fafb and seal fd38f5abf22c501b06e28321e9408d5562e154eb4a012c4988a64b910a6ffa2f.

claims.falsification: cache hydration is missing, has nonzero exit, or reports different downloaded/decompressed/cache file counts
claims.text: Pass 0034 cache hydration records lake exe cache get exit_code 0, downloaded_files 8542, decompressed_files 8542, cache_file_count 8542, and cache_byte_sum 432264798.

claims.falsification: the verifier run is missing, has nonzero exit, a non-PASS result, nonzero issue count, or a different duration or build job count
claims.text: Pass 0034 verifier run records scripts/verify.sh --no-log --all exit_code 0, result PASS, result_issue_count 0, duration_seconds 1184, and build_jobs 8574.

claims.falsification: frozen SHA pins, banned keyword scan, or Lake build status is missing or not PASS
claims.text: Pass 0034 verifier checks record frozen_sha_pins_status PASS, banned_keywords_status PASS, and lake_build_status PASS.

claims.falsification: the axiom checks are missing, fewer than ten, not PASS, or use a different axiom set
claims.text: Pass 0034 records ten Prob4b.Solution axiom checks, all PASS, each with axiom set propext, Classical.choice, and Quot.sound.

claims.falsification: statement gates are missing or either Prob4b.Discharge or Prob4b.Solution is not PASS
claims.text: Pass 0034 statement gates record Prob4b.Discharge PASS and Prob4b.Solution PASS.

claims.falsification: build artifact snapshot is missing or reports different .lake, cache, Prob4b build, or process counts
claims.text: Pass 0034 build artifact snapshot records .lake file_count 123892, .lake byte_sum 8009101293, cache_file_count 8542, Prob4b build file_count 75, and remaining_temp_processes 0.

claims.falsification: the validator result is missing, reports DRIFT, has different verifier result, Lake status, axiom status, cache count, Prob4b build count, or process count
claims.text: Pass 0034 validator result reports MATCH with verifier_exit_code 0, verifier_result PASS, lake_build_status PASS, theorem_axiom_status PASS, axiom_check_count 10, cache_file_count 8542, prob4b_build_file_count 75, and remaining_temp_processes 0.

claims.falsification: pass 0034 artifacts claim a natural law, axiom-free proof, all pipeline-math public claims verified, or a theorem outside the Lean artifact
claims.text: Pass 0034 preserves non-promotion boundaries: it verifies the local Lean replay harness under recorded toolchain, cache, axiom, and statement-gate boundaries while current_promoted_natural_laws remains none and public-claim overpromotion remains rejected.
